title: dryopteris carthusiana var. carthusiana
intro: Dryopteris carthusiana var. carthusiana, also known as Chartreuse lady fern, is a species of fern native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of Dryopteris carthusiana var. carthusiana typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be used to make tea or used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
